title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!
